text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
There's a ramp before the finish line, so before your next race, you
should add some leg strength exercises to your training.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Mhm... good call!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: My, what excellent advice, Suzuka.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Oh, Air Groove. Yes, all that studying actually paid off.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: But I'll never force myself into a box again. I've learned my lesson.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Everyone has up and downs in their lives. Those experiences are what
make you who you are today.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
True... I'm sure there will be many more lessons to come, and I'll take
them all to heart.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Then, someday, I'll pay you back for our last race.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Heh. Don't you think for a second that I'll make it easy for you.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Wooow, you guys really sound like rivals! I hope I can find one or two
once I debut...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
They really do help us grow into better racers... I'm sure you'll meet
someone wonderful, as long as you put in the effort.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! I'll start by winning my debut race! Suzuka, tell me more about
running strategies!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Someone's blasted to the front of the pack! It's Special Week! Special
Week's lead is growing by the second!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: ALL RIIIGHT! That's it! Make 'em eat your dust!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text: Special Week finishes in first place! She's won her debut race!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: OH YEAH! Way to go, Spe! Once we get back to campus, it's PARTY TIME!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Oooooh! That was the best debut everrr! Good for you, Speeee!

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text: The story of the greatest racer in Japan has just begun.

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text: The story of the greatest racer in Japan has just begun.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: It sure has.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Ehehe!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: ...Hehe.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Phew... That party wiped me out way more than the race for some
reason.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
If Gold Ship finds out I slipped away, there's no telling what she'll
make me do...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: I wonder if we'll have a party like this once I win a race as well.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Of course we will! I'll make tons of extra buttery baked potatoes!
You're the reason I won this race, so I gotta pay you back somehow!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Oh come on, I didn't do anything special.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
But you did! You taught me all sorts of stuff about running, helped me
around the school, and most of all...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
If I hadn't seen you run with a big smile on your face, I would never
have had the courage to chase my dreams!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
I could say the same thing to you. After watching you chase your
dreams so wholeheartedly, I wanted to do the same.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Spe, your straightforward emotions helped me take that vital first
step.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Ehehe... Suzuka, I promise I'll become the best racer in all of Japan!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
When I do, I hope I make you, my mom in Hokkaido, and Trainer
very, very proud!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
All right. As for me, I swear I'll never stop chasing the scenery I
seek—no matter what.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: It's a promise then! We'll both make our dreams come true.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Yes... I swear it.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: By the way, Suzuka... Is it just me, or did you call me Spe before?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Huh? Um... Did I call you something different?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
You did! Don't you dare play dumb with me! Do it again! Call me Spe
again!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Ehehe, oh, you...

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text: Who's the fav for today's race... Oh, it's Silence Suzuka!

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
The girl who runs like a runaway train? She hasn't done anything
recently that would warrant being the favorite...

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text: True, but I do want to see her win. Watching her run is seriously addicting!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Phew...

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text: Feeling confident? I don't detect any nervousness from you.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
I feel ready to take on the world. All thanks to you, my teammates,
and especially Spe.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: You can do it, Suzuka! I'll be in the front row cheering you on!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: All right, and I'll be sure to answer those cheers with a win.

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text:
Your performance during training has stabilized, so now all you have
to do is run with all you've got.
choice_data_list: Take in that beautiful scenery from the front!
Take in that beautiful scenery from the front!

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text:
Your performance during training has stabilized, so now all you have
to do is run with all you've got.
choice_data_list: Take in that beautiful scenery from the front!
Take in that beautiful scenery from the front!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Okay! Make sure you take in today's view too!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text: Silence Suzuka takes her place in the outer post of the gate.

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
The finish line lies 1,800 meters from the gate. Just who will get there
first? Aaand... they're off!
